zh.lifeSummary: Richard Copley是John Copley和Margaret的兒子，於從1375年到1392年出生在英國越可爾巴特利。他於大約1421年與Elizabeth結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。他去世於從1434年7月16日到1434年9月28日，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Copley是John Copley和Margaret的儿子，于从1375年到1392年出生在英国越可爾巴特利。他于大约1421年与Elizabeth结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。他去世于从1434年7月16日到1434年9月28日，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Copley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called Copley, for example in County Durham, Staffordshire, and Yorkshire, from the Old English personal name Coppa (apparently a byname for a tall man) or from copp ‘hilltop’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Copley was born from 1375 to 1392, in Batley, Yorkshire, England as the son of John Copley and Margaret. He married Elizabeth about 1421. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. He died from 16 July 1434 to 28 September 1434, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Copley est né du 1375 au 1392, à Batley, Everwyck, Angleterre, fils de John Copley et Margaret. Il a épousé Elizabeth environ 1421. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Il est décédé du 16 juillet 1434 au 28 septembre 1434, et a été enterré à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Copley wurde von 1375 bis 1392 in Batley, Yorkshire, England, als Sohn von John Copley und Margaret geboren. Er hat um 1421 Elizabeth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Er starb von 16. Juli 1434 bis 28. September 1434 und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Copley è nato il da 1375 a 1392 nel Batley, Yorkshire, England come figlio di John Copley e Margaret. Lui sposato Elizabeth circa 1421. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì da 16 luglio 1434 a 28 settembre 1434, e fu sepolto a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Copleyはから1375年まで1392年にイギリスヨークシュアイアバトリーでJohn CopleyとMargaretの息子として生まれた。約1421年にElizabethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼はから1434年7月16日まで1434年9月28日に死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Copley(은)는 1375년 부터 1392년 까지 영국 요르크실르 바틀리에서 John Copley(와)과 Margaret의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1421년 Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1434년 7월 16일부터 1434년 9월 28일까지 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Copley nasceu de 1375 a 1392, em Batley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filho de John Copley e Margaret. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth aproximadamente 1421. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ele faleceu de 16 de julho de 1434 a 28 de setembro de 1434, e foi sepultado em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Copley родился с 1375 по 1392 в местности батли, еркшир, Англия. Его родителей звали John Copley и Margaret. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth около 1421 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Он умер с 16 июля 1434 по 28 сентября 1434 и был похоронен в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.
